zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：弱势横盘偏空整理
zh.content:
当前跌破20日均线，价格贴近1757附近窄幅整理，整体趋势偏弱，空头占优，缺乏反弹动能，短线维持震荡下行结构，市场情绪谨慎。

MACD指标为负值且动能线走弱，空头动能延续；RSI虽未给出但价格持续低位运行，短期缺乏反转信号，市场偏弱震荡为主，需等待放量确认。

下方关键支撑位于1757-1757.1附近，若失守可能下探1750整数关口；上方阻力首先看1759.5，其次1771.86的20日均线压制明显。

建议短线以区间交易为主，激进者可在接近支撑位轻仓试多，跌破则顺势做空，严格设置止损控制风险并关注突破方向确认信号变化。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently trading in a narrow consolidation range around 1757, reflecting a lack of directional momentum after a mild intraday drift lower. The broader short-term structure remains slightly bearish as price continues to hold below the 20-period SMA at 1771.86. This positioning suggests sellers still have marginal control, although volatility compression indicates potential for an imminent breakout once volume expands decisively.

Momentum indicators reinforce a cautious outlook. The MACD reading at -0.75 remains in negative territory, signaling persistent downside pressure, while the absence of a clear signal line reading limits confirmation of reversal strength. With RSI data unavailable, price action and moving averages take precedence. Trading below the SMA(20) further supports a bearish bias, suggesting rallies may face selling pressure unless momentum shifts decisively upward.

Immediate support is forming near 1750, with a secondary cushion around 1740 if selling pressure intensifies. A breakdown below these levels could expose deeper downside toward the 1715 region. On the upside, initial resistance sits at 1772, aligned with the 20-day moving average, followed by stronger resistance at 1785 and 1800. A sustained break above 1772 would be required to neutralize near-term bearish pressure.

Traders may consider maintaining a defensive stance while price remains below the 20-day SMA, favoring short-term range trading strategies rather than trend continuation longs. Scalpers can look for fades near resistance zones, particularly 1770–1785, while risk-managed shorts may be viable on rejection signals. A shift in momentum confirmation above 1772 would invalidate bearish setups and open room for rotational upside toward 1800. Position sizing and tight stops remain essential in the current low-volatility environment.
